item.title: Blizzard live updates: Snow totals top 2 feet as wind gusts reach 80 mph
item.description: A massive winter storm is barreling through the Northeast, dumping more than 2 feet of snow.

item.title: What to know about Mexico violence as president offers reassurances
item.description: Widespread cartel-organized violence erupted following his death, with vehicles set on fire and hundreds of road blockages, Mexican officials said.

item.title: Trump continues to lash out at Supreme Court after tariff ruling
item.description: President Trump continues to lash out at the Supreme Court days after a majority of justices struck down most of his global tariffs as illegal.

item.title: LIVE: ABC News Live
item.description: 24/7 coverage of breaking news and live events

item.title: WATCH: Smoke blankets Mexico's Puerto Vallarta after death of cartel leader
item.description: Widespread violence erupted after a cartel boss was killed in a military raid.
